mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.min AS "min", a.max AS "max", a.daymoney AS "daymoney", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_sign_set( id, min, max, daymoney, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{min}, #{max}, #{daymoney}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
